title: Zoom in - new text shows, old text disappears, X disappears
scenario: Zooming in on a big blue dot in the Poly Studio Mobile app causes old text (headline, swipe) and X button to disappear, replaced by new description text
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Locate a big blue dot (likely a device or feature indicator) on the screen.
Perform a zoom-in gesture (pinch-to-zoom) on the big blue dot.
Observe the UI elements during and after the zoom action.
expected: When zooming in on a big blue dot, the existing UI elements (headline text, swipe text, X close button) should remain visible and functional. New description text may appear as additional information, but existing elements should not disappear.
